text.text:
The staff is exceptionally kind, and the professional team of dentists explains every step of the procedure in detail while using the most advanced technologies and materials. They keep up with the latest trends in dentistry—from diagnostics to aesthetic treatments and painless procedures. I especially appreciate their personalized approach and attention to every detail.

The interior is stylishly designed, spotlessly clean, and the atmosphere is pleasant and relaxing—which means a lot when you’re visiting the dentist!

Highly recommended!

text.text:
I finally found a moment after my vacation in Montenegro to leave this much-deserved review for Sotir Dental Centar. During my trip, I had a major dental issue and was honestly worried no one would be able to help me on such short notice. To my surprise, not only did they accommodate me quickly, but the care I received was better than any dental experience I've ever had in New York.

From the moment I walked into Sotir Dental Centar, I was treated with professionalism, kindness, and genuine care. The staff was incredibly welcoming, and the dentist was both knowledgeable and compassionate — explaining everything in detail and making me feel completely at ease, even in an unexpected situation.

The office is modern, spotless, and equipped with the latest technology. It's clear they maintain a very high standard across the board, from cleanliness and communication to the actual dental work itself.

What started as a stressful situation turned into a surprisingly positive experience, and I’m truly grateful for their help. If you’re in Montenegro and in need of dental care, I can’t recommend Sotir Dental Centar enough. They turned my vacation emergency into one of the best dental visits I’ve ever had!

text.text: Докторка Кристина је одбила да ме услужи након што сам питао које материјале ће користити за пуњење.  Она је рекла да је постављање питања о материјалима непоштовање према њој, што је апсолутна лаж, јер материјали немају никакве везе са поштовањем.  Претпостављам да је моје јеврејско име Давид било разлог њеног одбијања да ми служи, или можда супер понос који није повезан са њеном професијом лекара.  У сваком случају, једноставно је бесмислица да лекар одбије да услужи пацијента због питања о коришћеним материјалима.  Ово је неприхватљиво.  Ово је флагрантно кршење медицинске етике.  Немој да се лечиш од ње.

text.text:
Kao korisnik usluga ove ordinacije sam prezadovoljan. Usluga i kvalitet rada je za najveću ocenu kao i ljubaznost i predusretljivost .

Naravno da čitajući recenzije odredjenih isfrustiranih individua, samo se potvrdjuje pravilo da neki daju sebi na značaju samo ako druge pokušaju da pinize, što naravno o njima sve govori.

Želim čitavom timu ordinacije sve najbolje i u životu i u poslu koji sjajno rade.

originalText.text: Ljubazno i profesionalno osoblje. Kvalitet za 10

text.text: Posjećujem ovu zubarsku ordinaciju redovno, ukazujući Dr Magdelinić povjerenje koje traje preko 14 godina. Usluga je izvanredna, osoblje izuzetno ljubazno i profesionalno. Doktorica Dijana je izuzetno stručna i iskusna u svom poslu. Svojim pristupom mi je uvijek pruža osećaj sigurnosti i komfora tokom pregleda i popravke zuba. Ordinacija je opremljena vrhunskom opremom, što dodatno doprinosi osećaju povjerenja u njihov rad. Toplo preporučujem ovu ordinaciju svima koji traže kvalitetnu stomatološku uslugu. Zaista su opravdali svoj ugled kao vrhunska zubarska ordinacija.

text.text:
Dr Dijana truly cares about her patients.
Not only is she incredibly informative and sensitive but she is fantastic at what she does.
I just had a cavity filling and it was most painless filling I have ever had.
She also incredibly encouraging and leaves you feeling great! On top of that she was kind to me and interested in me as a person, which was so refreshing.

The office is super clean, very welcoming and kind reception staff and comfortable office.
I HIGHLY recommend Dr Dijana and the rest of staff at Sotir.

text.text: Tim u ovoj ordinaciji je uvijek ljubazan i odgovoran. Uvijek je cisto, uredno, posjeduju nabolje materijale. Kod njih se ne osjecam kao kod zubara. Sve sto rade, rade profesionalno. Sve pohvale!

text.text: I have very bad experience with this dental clinic. They are very unprofessional. I was waiting 25 minutes for someone to meet me in their dental centar after my scheduled time. …
